bands.rationale: Causal: 250 Hz boom on Bass Rythm masking with kick fundamental. Interactional: cleanup pre-comp lets Compressor work on cleaned signal. Idiomatic: standard low-mid surgical cut on bass tracks per industrial production conventions.

inspired_by.excerpt: Strong resonance peaks at 250Hz on Bass Rythm

bands.rationale: Causal: sub-bass rumble below 30Hz adds no perceptual content but eats headroom. Interactional: HPF tightens kick attack and frees mastering bus headroom. Idiomatic: gentle 12 dB/oct cleanup HPF is standard pre-comp practice on percussive tracks.

inspired_by.excerpt: Sub band conflict: Kick 1 + Bass Rythm both > 35%

rationale: Sample test drive : 2 corrections — bell cut Bass Rythm 250 Hz mud + HPF Kick 1 sub-bass rumble cleanup.
